U

UART3Config - Class in com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3
Deprecated.
This class is instead by SerialPortSettings.
UART3Config(BaudRate, DataBits, ParityBit, StopBits) - Constructor for class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3.UART3Config
Deprecated.
Initializes a new instance of serial port settings using the specified baud rate, parity bit, data bits, and stop bits.
UART3Config(BaudRate, DataBits, ParityBit, StopBits, boolean) - Constructor for class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3.UART3Config
Deprecated.
 
UART3Port - Interface in com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3
Deprecated.
This module can be only supported on the following devices.
  • CPOS X5 A7/A10
  • N910 A7
  • N700 A7
  • N850 A7
  • U2000
The other devices please refer to SerialPort, which created by SerialPortManager.createInstance(com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.serialportmanager.SerialPortType, SerialPortSettings).
UART3Type - Enum in com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3
Deprecated.
This is instead by SerialPortType.

update(UpdateFiles, UpdateListener) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager.ExtDeviceManager
Transfers application/firmware to external device and starts update process.
UpdateFiles - Class in com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager
Files to update.

updateFirmwareOrApp(String, boolean) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager.ExtDeviceManager
Deprecated.
Replaced by ExtDeviceManager.update(UpdateFiles, UpdateListener).
UpdateListener - Interface in com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager
A listener used to monitor the result of file transfer.
